name: axial-campaign-content
description: Shared compendium module for the Axial campaign (PF1e)

scripts.unpack:equipment: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package unpack equipment --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/equipment
scripts.unpack:bestiary: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package unpack bestiary --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/bestiary
scripts.unpack:spells: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package unpack spells --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/spells
scripts.unpack: npm run unpack:equipment & npm run unpack:bestiary & npm run unpack:spells
scripts.pack:equipment: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package pack -n equipment --in src/equipment --out packs --type Module --id axial-campaign-content
scripts.pack:bestiary: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package pack -n bestiary --in src/bestiary --out packs --type Module --id axial-campaign-content
scripts.pack:spells: npx --package @foundryvtt/foundryvtt-cli fvtt package pack -n spells --in src/spells --out packs --type Module --id axial-campaign-content
scripts.pack: npm run pack:equipment & npm run pack:bestiary & npm run pack:spells
